utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Well , there is no way I am gonna get a shot . Maybe they can take the needle and thquirt it into my mouth , you know , like a thquirt gun .

utterances.speaker: Doctor
utterances.text: Hello , there . I am Dr . Carlin . I see someone having an allergic reaction .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Doctor , can I see you for just a minute please ? My brother has a slight phobia about needles .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Did you tell him about my thquirt gun idea ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_My brother has a slight phobia about needles .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: My brother , the PhD would like to know if there is any way to treat this orally .

utterances.speaker: Doctor
utterances.text: No , under these circumstances it has to be an injection , and it has to be now .
